# Case Study Writeups

End-to-end writeups from lab exercises (TryHackMe, HackTheBox, CTFs) and — with client permission only — anonymized real engagement summaries. This is where a visitor can see full methodology in action, not just tool lists.

Use [`TEMPLATE.md`](./TEMPLATE.md) for every new writeup.
